title: A2A additions to agent-templates/roles/*/role.json
description:
OPTIONAL additive block on the existing role manifest (agent-templates/schema/role-manifest.schema.json). Every field here has a derived default, so NO existing role.json needs editing for A2A to work — the projection reads `role`, `name`, `description`, `services`, `metadata` and `coordinator`, all of which already exist.

This block exists only to let a role improve its own discoverability (examples/tags) and to let a role opt OUT of being published. Adding this block to role-manifest.schema.json is a devops/backend task gated on this contract; it is not performed in the contract PR.

publish.description: false hides this role from the public card. It is still reachable on the EXTENDED card if the caller is allowlisted (see authz.md §5).

extendedOnly.description: true publishes this skill ONLY on the authenticated extended card (GetExtendedAgentCard), never on the anonymous /.well-known/agent-card.json. Use for skills whose mere existence is sensitive.

tags.description: Extra tags merged with the derived tags. Derived tags are never removed.

examples.description: Example prompts a caller can send to this skill. STRONGLY RECOMMENDED: this is the primary signal a calling agent uses to decide whether this skill fits its goal. Absent examples make a skill effectively undiscoverable.

scopes.description: OAuth scopes required for THIS skill, projected into the skill's securityRequirements. Lets one agent expose a read-only skill broadly and a mutating skill narrowly.
